message:
Add DCG status indicator to dashboard stats bar

Add a badge showing DCG (Destructive Command Guard) status:
- Green "DCG" badge when enabled and available
- Lavender badge with count when commands have been blocked
- Yellow warning when DCG enabled but binary not found
- Badge hidden when DCG not enabled in config

Implementation follows existing badge patterns (scan, mail, checkpoint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
